title: Inauguration of an RNG Production Unit at the Hartland Landfill Site
content:
Waga Energy announces the start-up of Renewable Natural Gas (RNG) production at the Hartland landfill site in British Columbia. The project, carried out in partnership with Capital Regional District (CRD) and FortisBC, is the first facility of its kind on Vancouver Island.
The recovery unit uses hashtag#WAGABOXÂ® technology to transform the gas produced by decomposing waste into RNG that can be injected into FortisBCâ€™s distribution network.
author: Analysts Account
